name: katastr
postInstall: sudo install -d /usr/local/share/katastr/lib && sudo cp -r "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/katastr_core" /usr/local/share/katastr/lib/katastr_core && sudo cp "${PLUGIN_DIR}/bin/katastr" /usr/local/bin/katastr
onUpdate: sudo install -d /usr/local/share/katastr/lib && sudo rm -rf /usr/local/share/katastr/lib/katastr_core && sudo cp -r "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/katastr_core" /usr/local/share/katastr/lib/katastr_core && sudo cp "${PLUGIN_DIR}/bin/katastr" /usr/local/bin/katastr
